title: DataQualityMetric
content:
# DataQualityMetric


## Properties

- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Data Quality Metric.
- **title** (`string`): Display name (`title`) of the Data Quality Metric.
- **data_type_name** (`string`): 
- **description** (`string`): Optional description of the Data Quality Metric.
- **is_protected** (`boolean`): Indicates whether this metric is system-protected and cannot be modified or deleted.
- **in_use_by** (`array`): List of workload sources that are using this Data Quality Metric.
- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Data Quality Metric was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): The user or process that created this Data Quality Metric.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Data Quality Metric keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated_by** (`string`): The user or process that last updated this Data Quality Metric.
summary: Object with properties: name, title, data_type_name, description, is_protected

name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Data Quality Metric.

title.description: Display name (`title`) of the Data Quality Metric.

description.example: Custom metric for high-priority assets requiring 99.9% uptime

is_protected.description: Indicates whether this metric is system-protected and cannot be modified or deleted.

created.description: UTC time when the Data Quality Metric was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: The user or process that created this Data Quality Metric.

updated.description: UTC time when any Data Quality Metric keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: The user or process that last updated this Data Quality Metric.
